_description: Fixture state/linear.json for the linear-ticket-trigger self-test. One team, assignee trigger on 'operator@example.com'. state_transitions defines the 4 Linear states Commander marks as its own ('In Progress' = on_pickup, 'In Review' = on_pr_opened, 'Done' = on_pr_merged, 'Blocked' = on_stuck). scripts/linear-pickup-dispatch.sh filters out tickets in any of those states. See docs/specs/2026-04-17-linear-ticket-trigger.md.
